creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Updating all the xorg-related stuff today (since FreeBSD 10.0-CURRENT moved on using LLVM/CLANG 3.2 with bugfixes and I'd like to asure that everything is compiled correct) failed today when doing "portmaster x11/xdm".

After doing "portmaster -f xorg xdm" I realized that portmaster truncates the database of installed ports when it fails on x11/xdm: there is no reported installation of x11/xdm, but the binaries are in place and the timestamp is recent.

I can not install x11/xdm correctly anymore, I end up always with the below shown error message.

===>  Installing for xdm-1.1.11
===>   Generating temporary packing list
Making install in app-defaults
test -z "/usr/local/share/X11/app-defaults" || /usr/local/bin/gmkdir -p "/usr/local/share/X11/app-defaults"
 install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 Chooser '/usr/local/share/X11/app-defaults'
Making install in chooser
test -z "/usr/local/lib/X11/xdm" || /usr/local/bin/gmkdir -p "/usr/local/lib/X11/xdm"
  /bin/sh ../libtool   --mode=install install  -s -o root -g wheel -m 555 chooser '/usr/local/lib/X11/xdm'
libtool: install: install -o root -g wheel -m 555 -s chooser /usr/local/lib/X11/xdm/chooser
Making install in config
/usr/bin/make  install-am
test -z "/usr/local/lib/X11/xdm/pixmaps" || /usr/local/bin/gmkdir -p "/usr/local/lib/X11/xdm/pixmaps"
 install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 xorg-bw.xpm xorg.xpm '/usr/local/lib/X11/xdm/pixmaps'
test -z "/usr/local/share/examples/xdm" || /usr/local/bin/gmkdir -p "/usr/local/share/examples/xdm"
 install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 Xaccess '/usr/local/share/examples/xdm'
test -z "/usr/local/share/examples/xdm" || /usr/local/bin/gmkdir -p "/usr/local/share/examples/xdm"
 install  -o root -g wheel -m 555 GiveConsole TakeConsole Xsetup_0 Xwilling '/usr/local/share/examples/xdm'
test -z "/usr/local/share/examples/xdm" || /usr/local/bin/gmkdir -p "/usr/local/share/examples/xdm"
 install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 xdm-config Xresources Xservers '/usr/local/share/examples/xdm'
test -z "/usr/local/share/examples/xdm" || /usr/local/bin/gmkdir -p "/usr/local/share/examples/xdm"
 install  -o root -g wheel -m 555 Xreset Xsession Xstartup '/usr/local/share/examples/xdm'
Making install in greeter
test -z "/usr/local/lib/X11/xdm" || /usr/local/bin/gmkdir -p "/usr/local/lib/X11/xdm"
 /bin/sh ../libtool   --mode=install /usr/bin/install -c -o root -g wheel   libXdmGreet.la '/usr/local/lib/X11/xdm'
libtool: install: /usr/bin/install -c -o root -g wheel .libs/libXdmGreet.so /usr/local/lib/X11/xdm/libXdmGreet.so
libtool: install: /usr/bin/install -c -o root -g wheel .libs/libXdmGreet.lai /usr/local/lib/X11/xdm/libXdmGreet.la
Making install in include
Making install in man
test -z "/usr/local/man/man1" || /usr/local/bin/gmkdir -p "/usr/local/man/man1"
 install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 xdm.1 '/usr/local/man/man1'
test -z "/usr/local/man/man1" || /usr/local/bin/gmkdir -p "/usr/local/man/man1"
Making install in xdm
test -z "/usr/local/bin" || /usr/local/bin/gmkdir -p "/usr/local/bin"
  /bin/sh ../libtool   --mode=install install  -s -o root -g wheel -m 555 xdm '/usr/local/bin'
libtool: install: install -o root -g wheel -m 555 -s xdm /usr/local/bin/xdm
Making install in xdmshell
test -z "/usr/local/bin" || /usr/local/bin/gmkdir -p "/usr/local/bin"
test -z "" || /usr/local/bin/gmkdir -p ""
/bin/cp -n /usr/local/share/examples/xdm/GiveConsole /usr/local/lib/X11/xdm/GiveConsole
*** [post-install] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/x11/xdm.
*** [install] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/x11/xdm.

===>>> Installation of xdm-1.1.11 (x11/xdm) failed
===>>> Aborting update

Terminated

===>>> You can restart from the point of failure with this command line:
       portmaster <flags> x11/xdm

How-To-Repeat: Try updating x11/xdm on an existing installation
